stemHtml: An aircraft descends from FL340 to an airfield at MSL, where ambient temperature is +10°C. Relating to the "Cold Soak Effect", which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: Pitot tube and static port may be covered in ice.
options.b: Wings may be covered in ice.
options.c: Rudder may be covered in ice.
options.d: Horizontal stabilizer may be covered in ice.
